# Probing (synthetic test fixture)

This file is a test-only stand-in for the real `how-to-interview/` knowledge base. It is not
course material; it exists so the test suite and CI run without the real, gitignored folders.

When an answer is missing or thin on a STAR element, ask one follow-up aimed at that element:

- Missing Situation: "Set the scene for me — what was the team and what was at stake?"
- Missing Result: "How did that land? What changed, in numbers if you have them?"

Never suggest the answer or lead the witness. Cap follow-ups per story; when an answer is
complete, move on rather than belaboring it.
